asserts.query: SELECT 1 FROM event WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'scheduled' AND event_dates IS NOT NULL
SELECT 1 FROM event WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'cancelled'
SELECT 1 FROM event WHERE id = 1 AND status IN ('scheduled','rescheduled') AND status = 'sellout_reached'
SELECT 1 FROM venue v WHERE v.id = 1 AND v.status = 'registered' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM seating_section s WHERE s.venue_id = v.id)
SELECT 1 FROM seating_section WHERE venue_id = 1 AND capacity < 1
SELECT 1 FROM "order" WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'paid'
SELECT 1 FROM "order" WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'paid' AND status IN ('placed','payment_failed')
SELECT 1 FROM ticket WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'sold'
SELECT 1 FROM ticket WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'sold' AND status IN ('reserved','released')
SELECT 1 FROM ticket WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'admitted' AND status = 'cancelled'
SELECT 1 FROM refund WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'issued'
SELECT 1 FROM refund WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'failed' AND status = 'issued'
SELECT 1 FROM waitlist_offer WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'waitlist_offer_made'
SELECT 1 FROM waitlist_offer WHERE id = 1 AND status = 'waitlist_offer_made' AND status = 'waitlist_joined'
